name: L-2 fetcher --dry-run emits planned-call summary with no_network=true per the §2.14 dry-run contract
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/fetch.sh" --source cfpb-consumerfinance --dry-run --batch-size 5 --max-batches 3 2>out.txt && grep -q 'dry-run source=cfpb-consumerfinance' out.txt && grep -q 'planned_calls=15' out.txt && grep -q 'no_network=true' out.txt && echo planned 1>&2
